sigWerErrors.reason: Difference is only in capitalization, which does not affect meaning in Vietnamese.
The insertion of 'được' (can/be allowed to) does not change the overall meaning of the sentence in this context; both versions ask about the possibility of increasing the limit.
The only difference is the missing question mark, which is ignored per the guidance.
